creator: dervish@ikhala.tcimet.net
text:
The checksum for the gzipped tarball of the wwwcount sources has changed.

Fix: 

As the maintainer I generated a new checksum by doing a "make checksum"
in /usr/ports/www/wwwcount yielding the new md5 file:

MD5 (wwwcount2.5.tar.gz) = 69f96cd0ef025bd7f0ada6979a6100bb
How-To-Repeat: ikhala.tcimet.net:ports> cd www/wwwcount
ikhala.tcimet.net:wwwcount> make
===>  Extracting for wwwcount-2.5
